creator: alex@kuznetcoff.ru
text:
Hi,

After mysql-client port was updated to 5.7.33, it fails to build due to:

[00:00:01] => mysql-boost-5.7.33.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/databases/mysql57-client/../mysql57-server/distinfo.
[00:00:01] => Either /usr/ports/databases/mysql57-client/../mysql57-server/distinfo is out of date, or
[00:00:01] => mysql-boost-5.7.33.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
[00:00:01] *** Error code 1
